description: Handwrytten is a service for automating the sending of physical handwritten notes and cards. It provides card ordering, address book, custom card, gift card, QR code, and related mailing features.
summary: Handwrytten exposes one REST API for sending handwritten cards and managing related resources; it primarily uses dashboard-generated API keys, with a deprecated login/password-to-UID auth flow still documented for legacy clients.
